chat.author: Michelle Cotton
chat.text: Session 2: Participating in the IETF,  will be starting in 5 minutes.

chat.author: Emil Lundberg
chat.text:
Michelle Cotton said:

Session 2: Participating in the IETF,  will be starting in 5 minutes.

So this (using Zulip instead of the Meetecho chat) is how I've seen other people do "quote replies" earlier!

chat.author: Leonard Gebauer
chat.text:
Hey, everyone.
Just two questions, maybe someone can help me out with that:
Is there anywhere I can watch sessions or meetings that I missed? And are BoF meetings accessible remotely by default, or are there any restrictions?

chat.author: Laura Scalone
chat.text: I think you can watch the sessions you missed on youtube

chat.author: Laura Scalone
chat.text: there is an official channel with all the session recorded

chat.author: Michelle Cotton
chat.text: @Leonard - Yes, sessions are recorded and you can watch anything you missed.

chat.author: Michelle Cotton
chat.text: @Leonard - BoF meetings also use Meetecho and are recorded.

chat.author: Leonard Gebauer
chat.text: @Michelle - i had the same question as Christian

chat.author: Leonard Gebauer
chat.text: So i left the queue, everything fine.
